pageDescription: Convert height between different units such as centimeters, meters, feet, and inches for medical, fitness, and general use
enter_height: Convert your height into diffrent units.

conversion.title: Height Conversions
conversion.description: 1 inch = 2.54 cm, 1 foot = 30.48 cm, 1 meter = 100 cm

percentiles.title: Height Percentiles
percentiles.description: Percentiles compare height to population averages for age and gender

growth.title: Growth Patterns
growth.description: Most height growth occurs during puberty, typically ages 10-16

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides height conversions only
criticalWarningsList.medical: Consult healthcare professionals for medical height assessments

importantNotesList: Adult height is largely determined by genetics but can be affected by nutrition and health
Children's height percentiles should be tracked over time for proper growth assessment
Height measurements should be taken without shoes for accuracy
Consider cultural and ethnic variations in height distributions

messages.enterInformation: Enter your height to convert between units
messages.resultMessage: Your converted height is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides height conversions based on standard measurement systems. Percentile information is for general reference only and should not be used as a substitute for professional medical assessment.

seekHelp.title: Health Resources
seekHelp.content: For medical height assessments, growth monitoring, or concerns about height development, consult healthcare professionals or pediatricians for personalized evaluation and advice.

tooltips.inputUnit: The unit of measurement you're converting from
tooltips.outputUnit: The unit of measurement you're converting to

enter_child_and_parent_information_then_: Enter child and parent information, then click
based_on_childs_current_age_height_weigh:
Based on child's current age, height, weight, and parents' heights. More accurate for
                              children 4+ years old.
based_only_on_parents_heights_can_be_use:
Based only on parents' heights. Can be used for any age but less accurate than
                              Khamis-Roche.
enter_childs_current_measurements_and_pa: Enter child's current measurements and parents' heights
enter_child_and_parent_information_then_: Enter child and parent information, then click
based_on_childs_current_age_height_weigh:
Based on child's current age, height, weight, and parents' heights. More accurate for
                              children 4+ years old.
based_only_on_parents_heights_can_be_use:
Based only on parents' heights. Can be used for any age but less accurate than
                              Khamis-Roche.
childs_age_height_weight_parents_heights: Child's age, height, weight, parents' heights
uses_regression_coefficients_from_longit: Uses regression coefficients from longitudinal study
can_be_used_for_any_age_64: Can be used for any age
predictions_are_estimates_based_on_stati: Predictions are estimates based on statistical models
nutrition_health_and_lifestyle_can_affec: Nutrition, health, and lifestyle can affect final height
genetic_factors_account_for_80_of_height: Genetic factors account for ~80% of height variation
environmental_factors_can_influence_grow: Environmental factors can influence growth patterns
